app/page.tsx:export default function StorytellerApp() {
app/page.tsx:  const calculateMatchScore = useCallback((tags: string[], userProfile: UserProfile) => {
app/page.tsx:    if (!tags || tags.length === 0) return 0;
app/page.tsx:    let score = 30; // Base score for being in the app
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    // Role match
app/page.tsx:    if (userProfile.preferredRole !== 'none') {
app/page.tsx:      const lowerRole = userProfile.preferredRole!.toLowerCase();
app/page.tsx:      if (tags.some(t => t.toLowerCase().includes(lowerRole))) {
app/page.tsx:        score += 25;
app/page.tsx:      }
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    // Genre match
app/page.tsx:    if (userProfile.genres && userProfile.genres.length > 0) {
app/page.tsx:      const genreMatches = tags.filter(t => userProfile.genres.some(g => t.toLowerCase().includes(g.toLowerCase())));
app/page.tsx:      score += (genreMatches.length / Math.max(tags.length, 1)) * 40;
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    // Intensity and Elements
app/page.tsx:    const intensityMatch = tags.some(t => t.toLowerCase().includes(userProfile.intensity.toLowerCase()));
app/page.tsx:    if (intensityMatch) score += 5;
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    return Math.min(Math.round(score + (Math.random() * 8)), 99); // Max 99 for that "Netflix" feel
app/page.tsx:  }, []);

app/page.tsx:    return history
app/page.tsx:      .filter(h => h.type === 'text' || h.type === 'reconstruction')
app/page.tsx:      .map(h => {
app/page.tsx:        // Extract a "topic" from the content or just use the first few words
app/page.tsx:        const firstLine = h.content.split('\n')[0].substring(0, 40);

app/page.tsx:      })

app/page.tsx:          
app/page.tsx:          if (isQuotaError && retries < maxRetries) {

app/page.tsx:            const delay = 3000 * Math.pow(2, retries - 1);

app/page.tsx:            continue;

app/page.tsx:          throw error;
app/page.tsx:        }

app/page.tsx:      }

app/page.tsx:  const startVoiceRecording = async () => {
app/page.tsx:    try {
app/page.tsx:      const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true });
app/page.tsx:      const mediaRecorder = new MediaRecorder(stream);
app/page.tsx:      mediaRecorderRef.current = mediaRecorder;
app/page.tsx:      audioChunksRef.current = [];
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      mediaRecorder.ondataavailable = (event) => {
app/page.tsx:        if (event.data.size > 0) {
app/page.tsx:          audioChunksRef.current.push(event.data);
app/page.tsx:        }
app/page.tsx:      };
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      mediaRecorder.onstop = async () => {
app/page.tsx:        const audioBlob = new Blob(audioChunksRef.current, { type: 'audio/webm' });
app/page.tsx:        const reader = new FileReader();
app/page.tsx:        reader.readAsDataURL(audioBlob);
app/page.tsx:        reader.onloadend = async () => {
app/page.tsx:          const base64Audio = reader.result as string;
app/page.tsx:          await analyzeAndRegisterVoice(base64Audio);
app/page.tsx:        };
app/page.tsx:        stream.getTracks().forEach(track => track.stop());
app/page.tsx:      };
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      mediaRecorder.start();
app/page.tsx:      setIsRecording(true);
app/page.tsx:      setRecordingDuration(0);
app/page.tsx:      recordingTimerRef.current = setInterval(() => {
app/page.tsx:        setRecordingDuration(prev => prev + 1);
app/page.tsx:      }, 1000);
app/page.tsx:    } catch (err) {
app/page.tsx:      setToast({ message: "Microphone access denied. Cannot record voice.", type: 'error' });
app/page.tsx:      console.error(err);
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:  };
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:  const stopVoiceRecording = () => {

app/page.tsx:      mediaRecorderRef.current.stop();
app/page.tsx:      setIsRecording(false);
app/page.tsx:      if (recordingTimerRef.current) clearInterval(recordingTimerRef.current);
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:  };

app/page.tsx:  const analyzeAndRegisterVoice = async (base64Audio: string) => {
app/page.tsx:    if (!user) return;
app/page.tsx:    setLoading(true);
app/page.tsx:    setToast({ message: "AI Analysing Acoustic Profile...", type: 'info' });
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    try {
app/page.tsx:      const apiKey = (process.env as any).API_KEY || process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_GEMINI_API_KEY || '';
app/page.tsx:      const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey });
app/page.tsx:      
app/page.tsx:      const prompt = `Analyze this voice sample. Describe its acoustic properties (pitch, tone, raspiness, cadence, gender perception, emotional weight) in a detailed but concise "Acoustic Profile". Stay in the Pulp Noir character (technical but gritty).`;
app/page.tsx:      
app/page.tsx:      const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
app/page.tsx:        model: "gemini-1.5-flash",
app/page.tsx:        contents: [
app/page.tsx:          {
app/page.tsx:            role: 'user',
app/page.tsx:            parts: [
app/page.tsx:              { text: prompt },
app/page.tsx:              {
app/page.tsx:                inlineData: {
app/page.tsx:                  data: base64Audio.split(',')[1],
app/page.tsx:                  mimeType: "audio/webm"
app/page.tsx:                }
app/page.tsx:              }
app/page.tsx:            ]
app/page.tsx:          }
app/page.tsx:        ]
app/page.tsx:      });
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      const analysis = response.text || "The analysis was lost in the grain...";
app/page.tsx:      const voiceName = `Voice Double ${clonedVoices.length + 1}`;
app/page.tsx:      
app/page.tsx:      const voicePath = `users/${user.uid}/voices`;

app/page.tsx:        uid: user.uid,

app/page.tsx:        sampleData: base64Audio,
app/page.tsx:        analysis: analysis,
app/page.tsx:        isPrimary: clonedVoices.length === 0,
app/page.tsx:        createdAt: Date.now()
app/page.tsx:      });
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      setToast({ message: "Voice Registered Successfully in the Vault!", type: 'success' });
app/page.tsx:    } catch (err) {
app/page.tsx:      console.error(err);
app/page.tsx:      setToast({ message: "Voice Analysis Failed. Try a clearer sample.", type: 'error' });
app/page.tsx:    } finally {
app/page.tsx:      setLoading(false);
app/page.tsx:    }

app/page.tsx:  const pcmToWav = (base64Pcm: string, sampleRate: number = 24000) => {
app/page.tsx:    const binaryString = window.atob(base64Pcm);
app/page.tsx:    const len = binaryString.length;
app/page.tsx:    const bytes = new Int16Array(len / 2);
app/page.tsx:    const dataView = new DataView(new Uint8Array(len).buffer);
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    // Convert binary string to Int16Array (Gemini returns 16-bit PCM)
app/page.tsx:    for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) {
app/page.tsx:      dataView.setUint8(i, binaryString.charCodeAt(i));
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:    for (let i = 0; i < bytes.length; i++) {
app/page.tsx:      bytes[i] = dataView.getInt16(i * 2, true);
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    const wavHeader = new ArrayBuffer(44);
app/page.tsx:    const view = new DataView(wavHeader);
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    // RIFF identifier
app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(0, 0x52494646, false); // "RIFF"
app/page.tsx:    // file length
app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(4, 36 + bytes.length * 2, true);
app/page.tsx:    // RIFF type
app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(8, 0x57415645, false); // "WAVE"
app/page.tsx:    // format chunk identifier
app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(12, 0x666d7420, false); // "fmt "
app/page.tsx:    // format chunk length
app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(16, 16, true);
app/page.tsx:    // sample format (1 is PCM)
app/page.tsx:    view.setUint16(20, 1, true);
app/page.tsx:    // channel count
app/page.tsx:    view.setUint16(22, 1, true);
app/page.tsx:    // sample rate
app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(24, sampleRate, true);
app/page.tsx:    // byte rate (sampleRate * channelCount * bitsPerSample / 8)
app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(28, sampleRate * 1 * 16 / 8, true);
app/page.tsx:    // block align (channelCount * bitsPerSample / 8)
app/page.tsx:    view.setUint16(32, 1 * 16 / 8, true);
app/page.tsx:    // bits per sample
app/page.tsx:    view.setUint16(34, 16, true);
app/page.tsx:    // data chunk identifier
app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(36, 0x64617461, false); // "data"
app/page.tsx:    // data chunk length
app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(40, bytes.length * 2, true);
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    const blob = new Blob([wavHeader, bytes], { type: 'audio/wav' });
app/page.tsx:    return URL.createObjectURL(blob);
app/page.tsx:  };
app/page.tsx:

app/page.tsx:    if (!user) return;
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    console.log(`Payment successful for ${plan} plan via ${method}:`, paymentData);
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    // In a real production app with a gateway (like Razorpay), 
app/page.tsx:    // this would be triggered by a webhook after verifying the transaction.
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    let expiry = 0;
app/page.tsx:    const now = Date.now();
app/page.tsx:    if (plan === 'trial') expiry = now + (7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
app/page.tsx:    if (plan === 'monthly') expiry = now + (30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
app/page.tsx:    if (plan === 'yearly') expiry = now + (365 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
app/page.tsx:    if (plan === 'lifetime') expiry = -1;
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    const updates = { 
app/page.tsx:      isPro: true, 
app/page.tsx:      subscriptionType: plan, 
app/page.tsx:      subscriptionExpiry: expiry,
app/page.tsx:      updatedAt: now 
app/page.tsx:    };
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    updateDoc(doc(db, `users/${user.uid}`), updates)
app/page.tsx:      .then(() => {
app/page.tsx:        setProfile(prev => ({ ...prev, ...updates }));
app/page.tsx:        setToast({ message: `SUCCESS: Your ${plan.toUpperCase()} plan is now active!`, type: 'success' });
app/page.tsx:      })
app/page.tsx:      .catch(e => handleFirestoreError(e, OperationType.UPDATE, `users/${user.uid}`));

app/page.tsx:  const handleUPIPayment = (plan: any) => {
app/page.tsx:    const upiId = "7869690819@okbizaxis";
app/page.tsx:    const name = "Royal Bulls Advisory";
app/page.tsx:    const amount = plan.price;
app/page.tsx:    const note = `Pulp Noir ${plan.label} Subscription`;
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    // UPI Deep Link
app/page.tsx:    const upiUrl = `upi://pay?pa=${upiId}&pn=${encodeURIComponent(name)}&am=${amount}&cu=INR&tn=${encodeURIComponent(note)}`;
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    // Open UPI App
app/page.tsx:    window.location.href = upiUrl;
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    // Simulation: In this environment, we simulate the success after a delay
app/page.tsx:    // In production, you'd wait for a webhook or manual verification
app/page.tsx:    setTimeout(() => {
app/page.tsx:      setConfirmModal({
app/page.tsx:        isOpen: true,

app/page.tsx:  const compressImage = (base64Str: string, maxWidth = 1024, maxHeight = 1024, quality = 0.7): Promise<string> => {
app/page.tsx:    return new Promise((resolve) => {
app/page.tsx:      const img = new window.Image();
app/page.tsx:      img.src = base64Str;
app/page.tsx:      img.onload = () => {
app/page.tsx:        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
app/page.tsx:        let width = img.width;
app/page.tsx:        let height = img.height;
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:        if (width > height) {
app/page.tsx:          if (width > maxWidth) {
app/page.tsx:            height *= maxWidth / width;
app/page.tsx:            width = maxWidth;
app/page.tsx:          }
app/page.tsx:        } else {
app/page.tsx:          if (height > maxHeight) {
app/page.tsx:            width *= maxHeight / height;
app/page.tsx:            height = maxHeight;
app/page.tsx:          }
app/page.tsx:        }
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:        canvas.width = width;
app/page.tsx:        canvas.height = height;
app/page.tsx:        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
app/page.tsx:        ctx?.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
app/page.tsx:        resolve(canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', quality));
app/page.tsx:      };
app/page.tsx:    });
app/page.tsx:  };

app/page.tsx:  const handleAudioDownload = async (part: StoryPart) => {
app/page.tsx:    let url = part.audioUrl;
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    if (!url) {
app/page.tsx:      // If no audio exists, we need to generate it.
app/page.tsx:      await speakContent(part.id, part.content);
app/page.tsx:      // The user can download once it's ready and they click again.
app/page.tsx:      return; 
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    if (url) {
app/page.tsx:      const link = document.createElement('a');
app/page.tsx:      link.href = url;
app/page.tsx:      link.download = `pulp-noir-audio-${part.id}.wav`;
app/page.tsx:      document.body.appendChild(link);

app/page.tsx:  const handleDownload = async (url: string, id: string) => {
app/page.tsx:    try {
app/page.tsx:      const response = await fetch(url);
app/page.tsx:      const blob = await response.blob();
app/page.tsx:      const blobUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
app/page.tsx:      const link = document.createElement('a');
app/page.tsx:      link.href = blobUrl;
app/page.tsx:      link.download = `pulp-noir-${id}.png`;
app/page.tsx:      document.body.appendChild(link);
app/page.tsx:      link.click();
app/page.tsx:      document.body.removeChild(link);
app/page.tsx:      URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl);
app/page.tsx:    } catch (error) {
app/page.tsx:      console.error("Download failed:", error);
app/page.tsx:      // Fallback
app/page.tsx:      const link = document.createElement('a');
app/page.tsx:      link.href = url;
app/page.tsx:      link.download = `pulp-noir-${id}.png`;
app/page.tsx:      link.target = "_blank";
app/page.tsx:      document.body.appendChild(link);
app/page.tsx:      link.click();
app/page.tsx:      document.body.removeChild(link);
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:  };

app/page.tsx:  const handleFeedback = async (id: string, feedback: 'up' | 'down') => {
app/page.tsx:    if (!user) return;
app/page.tsx:    setHistory(prev => prev.map(p => p.id === id ? { ...p, feedback } : p));
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    const newEvolution = {
app/page.tsx:      ...evolution,
app/page.tsx:      positiveFeedback: feedback === 'up' ? evolution.positiveFeedback + 1 : evolution.positiveFeedback,
app/page.tsx:      negativeFeedback: feedback === 'down' ? evolution.negativeFeedback + 1 : evolution.negativeFeedback
app/page.tsx:    };
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    // Dynamic Focus Evolution
app/page.tsx:    const totalFeedback = newEvolution.positiveFeedback + newEvolution.negativeFeedback;
app/page.tsx:    if (totalFeedback >= 5) {
app/page.tsx:      const ratio = newEvolution.positiveFeedback / totalFeedback;
app/page.tsx:      if (ratio > 0.8) {
app/page.tsx:        newEvolution.currentFocus = "Mastering Gritty Atmosphere & Emotional Resonance";
app/page.tsx:      } else if (ratio < 0.4) {
app/page.tsx:        newEvolution.currentFocus = "Refining Dialogue & Street-Level Authenticity";
app/page.tsx:      } else {
app/page.tsx:        newEvolution.currentFocus = "Balancing Psychological Depth & Noir Realism";
app/page.tsx:      }
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    // Update local state
app/page.tsx:    setEvolution(newEvolution);
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    // Update story feedback
app/page.tsx:    const storyPath = `users/${user.uid}/stories/${id}`;
app/page.tsx:    updateDoc(doc(db, storyPath), { feedback })
app/page.tsx:      .catch(e => handleFirestoreError(e, OperationType.UPDATE, storyPath));
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    // Update user evolution profile
app/page.tsx:    const userPath = `users/${user.uid}`;
app/page.tsx:    updateDoc(doc(db, userPath), { evolution: newEvolution })
app/page.tsx:      .catch(e => handleFirestoreError(e, OperationType.UPDATE, userPath));

app/page.tsx:  const handleActivation = async () => {
app/page.tsx:    if (!user || !activationKey) return;
app/page.tsx:    setIsActivating(true);
app/page.tsx:    try {
app/page.tsx:      const keyDoc = await getDoc(doc(db, 'access_keys', activationKey));
app/page.tsx:      if (!keyDoc.exists()) {
app/page.tsx:        setToast({ message: "Invalid Activation Key. Please check the code.", type: 'error' });
app/page.tsx:        return;
app/page.tsx:      }
app/page.tsx:      const keyData = keyDoc.data();
app/page.tsx:      if (keyData.isUsed) {
app/page.tsx:        setToast({ message: "This key has already been used.", type: 'error' });
app/page.tsx:        return;
app/page.tsx:      }
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'access_keys', activationKey), {
app/page.tsx:        isUsed: true,
app/page.tsx:        usedBy: user.uid,
app/page.tsx:        usedAt: Date.now()
app/page.tsx:      });
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      const userRef = doc(db, 'users', user.uid);
app/page.tsx:      await updateDoc(userRef, { isActivated: true });
app/page.tsx:      
app/page.tsx:      setProfile(prev => ({ ...prev, isActivated: true }));
app/page.tsx:      setToast({ message: "Activation Successful! Welcome to the Underworld.", type: 'success' });
app/page.tsx:    } catch (error) {
app/page.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.UPDATE, 'access_keys');
app/page.tsx:    } finally {
app/page.tsx:      setIsActivating(false);
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:  };
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:  const generateAccessKey = async () => {
app/page.tsx:    if (!user || user.email !== "royalbullsadvisory412@gmail.com") return;
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    // Generate a random 12-character key (XXXX-XXXX-XXXX)
app/page.tsx:    const chars = 'ABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZ23456789';
app/page.tsx:    const generateSegment = () => {
app/page.tsx:      let segment = '';
app/page.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
app/page.tsx:        segment += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length));
app/page.tsx:      }
app/page.tsx:      return segment;
app/page.tsx:    };
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    const newKey = `${generateSegment()}-${generateSegment()}-${generateSegment()}`;
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    try {
app/page.tsx:      await setDoc(doc(db, 'access_keys', newKey), {
app/page.tsx:        key: newKey,
app/page.tsx:        isUsed: false,
app/page.tsx:        createdAt: Date.now()
app/page.tsx:      });
app/page.tsx:      setToast({ message: `New Key Generated: ${newKey}`, type: 'success' });
app/page.tsx:    } catch (error) {
app/page.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.WRITE, 'access_keys');
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:  };

app/page.tsx:  const speak = (text: string) => {
app/page.tsx:    if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.speechSynthesis) {
app/page.tsx:      window.speechSynthesis.cancel();
app/page.tsx:      const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
app/page.tsx:      utterance.rate = 0.9;
app/page.tsx:      utterance.pitch = 0.8;
app/page.tsx:      window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:  };
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:  const speakContent = async (id: string, text: string, action: 'play' | 'pause' | 'stop' = 'play') => {
app/page.tsx:    const part = history.find(h => h.id === id);
app/page.tsx:    if (!part) return;
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    if (action === 'pause') {
app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current?.pause();
app/page.tsx:      setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, isSpeaking: false, isPaused: true } : h));
app/page.tsx:      return;
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    if (action === 'stop') {
app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current?.pause();
app/page.tsx:      if (ttsAudioRef.current) ttsAudioRef.current.currentTime = 0;
app/page.tsx:      setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, isSpeaking: false, isPaused: false } : h));
app/page.tsx:      return;
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    // Handle 'play'
app/page.tsx:    if (part.isSpeaking) {
app/page.tsx:      // Already playing, maybe toggle to pause?
app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current?.pause();
app/page.tsx:      setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, isSpeaking: false, isPaused: true } : h));
app/page.tsx:      return;
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    // Resume if paused and it's the same audio
app/page.tsx:    if (part.isPaused && ttsAudioRef.current && currentTTSIdRef.current === id) {
app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current.play().catch(e => console.error("TTS resume failed:", e));
app/page.tsx:      setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, isSpeaking: true, isPaused: false } : h));
app/page.tsx:      return;
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    // Stop any existing TTS audio if it's different
app/page.tsx:    if (ttsAudioRef.current && currentTTSIdRef.current !== id) {
app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current.pause();
app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current = null;
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    // If we already have the audio URL, just play it
app/page.tsx:    if (part.audioUrl) {
app/page.tsx:      currentTTSIdRef.current = id;
app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current = new Audio(part.audioUrl);
app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current.play().catch(e => console.error("TTS playback failed:", e));
app/page.tsx:      setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, isSpeaking: true, isPaused: false } : h));
app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current.onended = () => {
app/page.tsx:        setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, isSpeaking: false, isPaused: false } : h));
app/page.tsx:        currentTTSIdRef.current = null;
app/page.tsx:      };
app/page.tsx:      return;
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, isSpeaking: true, isPaused: false } : h));
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    const maxRetries = 2;
app/page.tsx:    let attempt = 0;
app/page.tsx:    let success = false;
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    while (attempt <= maxRetries && !success) {
app/page.tsx:      try {
app/page.tsx:        const apiKey = (process.env as any).API_KEY || process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_GEMINI_API_KEY || '';
app/page.tsx:        const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey });
app/page.tsx:        
app/page.tsx:        const ttsPrompt = `Narrate this entire gritty pulp story from start to finish. Do not skip any part. 
app/page.tsx:        MANDATORY: Use intense emotion (Ehsas), a noir style, and a human-like tone. 
app/page.tsx:        Shift your voice to capture the deep feelings, pain, and grit of the characters.
app/page.tsx:        Capture the atmosphere of the scene - if it's dark, sound serious and heavy; if it's a joke, sound cynical and sharp. 
app/page.tsx:        Speak like a seasoned storyteller in a smoky room in old Bombay.
app/page.tsx:        Text: ${text}`;
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:        const response = await ai.models.generateContentStream({
app/page.tsx:          model: "gemini-3.1-flash-tts-preview",
app/page.tsx:          contents: [{ parts: [{ text: ttsPrompt }] }],
app/page.tsx:          config: {
app/page.tsx:            maxOutputTokens: 16384,
app/page.tsx:            responseModalities: [Modality.AUDIO],
app/page.tsx:            safetySettings: [
app/page.tsx:              { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_HATE_SPEECH, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
app/page.tsx:              { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_HARASSMENT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
app/page.tsx:              { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUALLY_EXPLICIT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
app/page.tsx:              { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS_CONTENT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH }
app/page.tsx:            ],
app/page.tsx:            speechConfig: {
app/page.tsx:              voiceConfig: {
app/page.tsx:                prebuiltVoiceConfig: { voiceName: profile.voice },
app/page.tsx:              },
app/page.tsx:            },
app/page.tsx:          },
app/page.tsx:        });
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:        let audioBase64 = "";
app/page.tsx:        for await (const chunk of response) {
app/page.tsx:          const part = chunk.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.[0];
app/page.tsx:          if (part?.inlineData?.data) {
app/page.tsx:            audioBase64 += part.inlineData.data;
app/page.tsx:          }
app/page.tsx:        }
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:        if (audioBase64) {
app/page.tsx:          const audioUrl = pcmToWav(audioBase64);
app/page.tsx:          currentTTSIdRef.current = id;
app/page.tsx:          setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, audioUrl, isSpeaking: true, isPaused: false } : h));
app/page.tsx:          
app/page.tsx:          ttsAudioRef.current = new Audio(audioUrl);
app/page.tsx:          ttsAudioRef.current.play().catch(e => console.error("TTS playback failed:", e));
app/page.tsx:          ttsAudioRef.current.onended = () => {
app/page.tsx:            setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, isSpeaking: false, isPaused: false } : h));
app/page.tsx:            currentTTSIdRef.current = null;
app/page.tsx:          };
app/page.tsx:          success = true;
app/page.tsx:        } else {
app/page.tsx:          throw new Error("No audio data received");
app/page.tsx:        }
app/page.tsx:      } catch (error) {
app/page.tsx:        attempt++;
app/page.tsx:        console.warn(`TTS attempt ${attempt} failed:`, error);
app/page.tsx:        if (attempt > maxRetries) {
app/page.tsx:          // Fallback to browser TTS if all retries fail
app/page.tsx:          if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.speechSynthesis) {
app/page.tsx:            const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
app/page.tsx:            utterance.onstart = () => setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, isSpeaking: true, isPaused: false } : h));
app/page.tsx:            utterance.onend = () => setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, isSpeaking: false, isPaused: false } : h));
app/page.tsx:            window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
app/page.tsx:            success = true;
app/page.tsx:          }
app/page.tsx:        } else {
app/page.tsx:          // Wait a bit before retrying
app/page.tsx:          await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
app/page.tsx:        }
app/page.tsx:      }
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:  };

app/page.tsx:  const reconstructCrimeScene = async (query: string) => {
app/page.tsx:    if (!query || !user) return;
app/page.tsx:    setLoading(true);
app/page.tsx:    setPrompt('');
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    try {
app/page.tsx:      const apiKey = (process.env as any).API_KEY || process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_GEMINI_API_KEY || '';
app/page.tsx:      const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey });
app/page.tsx:      
app/page.tsx:      let retries = 0;
app/page.tsx:      const maxRetries = 2;
app/page.tsx:      let response;
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      while (retries <= maxRetries) {
app/page.tsx:        try {
app/page.tsx:          response = await ai.models.generateContent({
app/page.tsx:            model: "gemini-3-flash-preview",
app/page.tsx:            contents: [
app/page.tsx:              {
app/page.tsx:                role: 'user',
app/page.tsx:                parts: [
app/page.tsx:                  { 
app/page.tsx:                    text: `Analyze this crime/news headline from a psychological and noir perspective: "${query}". 
app/page.tsx:                    Reconstruct the scene. What was the perpetrator thinking? Why did they do it? How did it happen?
app/page.tsx:                    Tell it as a visceral, gritty noir reconstruction. Be detailed but maintain a dark, analytical tone.
app/page.tsx:                    Include a "Psychological Profile" section at the end.
app/page.tsx:                    
app/page.tsx:                    USER CUSTOMIZATION GATES:
app/page.tsx:                    ${getNaughtyInstructions()}
app/page.tsx:                    ${getIntensityInstructions()}
app/page.tsx:                    ${getUserAvatarInstructions()}
app/page.tsx:                    
app/page.tsx:                    AI Evolution Context: Version ${evolution.version}, Total Generations: ${evolution.totalGenerations}, Positive Feedback: ${evolution.positiveFeedback}, Negative Feedback: ${evolution.negativeFeedback}. Current Focus: ${evolution.currentFocus}. Use this feedback to refine the tone and style.`
app/page.tsx:                  }
app/page.tsx:                ]
app/page.tsx:              }
app/page.tsx:            ],
app/page.tsx:            config: {
app/page.tsx:              tools: [{ googleSearch: {} }],
app/page.tsx:              toolConfig: { includeServerSideToolInvocations: true },
app/page.tsx:              maxOutputTokens: 16384,
app/page.tsx:              safetySettings: [
app/page.tsx:                { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_HATE_SPEECH, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
app/page.tsx:                { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_HARASSMENT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
app/page.tsx:                { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUALLY_EXPLICIT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
app/page.tsx:                { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS_CONTENT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH }
app/page.tsx:              ]
app/page.tsx:            }
app/page.tsx:          });
app/page.tsx:          break; // Success
app/page.tsx:        } catch (error: any) {
app/page.tsx:          const errorString = String(error).toLowerCase();
app/page.tsx:          if ((errorString.includes("429") || errorString.includes("quota") || errorString.includes("rate limit")) && retries < maxRetries) {
app/page.tsx:            retries++;
app/page.tsx:            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 2000 * retries));
app/page.tsx:            continue;
app/page.tsx:          }
app/page.tsx:          throw error;
app/page.tsx:        }
app/page.tsx:      }
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      if (response?.candidates?.[0]?.finishReason && !['STOP', 'MAX_TOKENS'].includes(response.candidates[0].finishReason)) {
app/page.tsx:        throw new Error(`FinishReason: ${response.candidates[0].finishReason}`);
app/page.tsx:      }
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      const content = response?.text || "The reconstruction was lost in the shadows...";
app/page.tsx:      const id = Date.now().toString();
app/page.tsx:      
app/page.tsx:      const newPart: StoryPart = {
app/page.tsx:        uid: user.uid,
app/page.tsx:        type: 'reconstruction',
app/page.tsx:        content,
app/page.tsx:        id,
app/page.tsx:        isSaved: false,
app/page.tsx:        createdAt: Date.now()
app/page.tsx:      };
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      setHistory(prev => [newPart, ...prev]);
app/page.tsx:      
app/page.tsx:      const newEvolution = { ...evolution, totalGenerations: evolution.totalGenerations + 1 };
app/page.tsx:      setEvolution(newEvolution);
app/page.tsx:      
app/page.tsx:      if (user) {
app/page.tsx:        const userPath = `users/${user.uid}`;
app/page.tsx:        updateDoc(doc(db, userPath), { evolution: newEvolution })
app/page.tsx:          .catch(e => handleFirestoreError(e, OperationType.UPDATE, userPath));
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:        const path = `users/${user.uid}/stories/${id}`;
app/page.tsx:        setDoc(doc(db, path), newPart)
app/page.tsx:          .catch(e => handleFirestoreError(e, OperationType.WRITE, path));
app/page.tsx:      }
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      // Auto-generate artwork removed as per user request to handle it manually via button
app/page.tsx:      // generateImage(`A gritty, cinematic noir crime scene reconstruction: ${query}. 1950s pulp style, dramatic shadows, visceral details.`);
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:    } catch (error) {
app/page.tsx:      handleAIError(error, "Crime Reconstruction");
app/page.tsx:    } finally {
app/page.tsx:      setLoading(false);
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:  };

app/page.tsx:  const generateLore = async (context: string, location: string = 'General') => {

app/page.tsx:         (Note: If location is "Sagar, MP", mention places like 'Sagar ki Galiyan', the stagnant dust, the smell of cheap tobacco and heavy rain).
app/page.tsx:

app/page.tsx:          safetySettings: [
app/page.tsx:            { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_HATE_SPEECH, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
app/page.tsx:            { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_HARASSMENT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
app/page.tsx:            { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUALLY_EXPLICIT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
app/page.tsx:            { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS_CONTENT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH }
app/page.tsx:          ]
app/page.tsx:        }

app/page.tsx:    }

app/page.tsx:      case 'extreme':

app/page.tsx:        INTENSITY SETTING: EXPLICITLY ADULT (Hard-Boiled B-Grade).

app/page.tsx:        - Dialogue: Intensely aggressive, abusive, and visceral dialogue in conflict.

app/page.tsx:        `;

app/page.tsx:  const generateNewspaper = async () => {

app/page.tsx:    setIsGeneratingNewspaper(true);
app/page.tsx:    try {
app/page.tsx:      const apiKey = (process.env as any).API_KEY || process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_GEMINI_API_KEY || '';
app/page.tsx:      const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey });
app/page.tsx:      
app/page.tsx:      const locationStr = `${newspaperLocation.city}${newspaperLocation.state ? ', ' + newspaperLocation.state : ''}, ${newspaperLocation.country}`;
app/page.tsx:      
app/page.tsx:      const prompt = `
app/page.tsx:        GENERATE A PULP NOIR LOCAL NEWSLETTER (THE DAILY SHADOW)
app/page.tsx:        Location: ${locationStr}
app/page.tsx:        Language: ${newspaperLanguage}
app/page.tsx:        Focus Category: ${newspaperCategory}

app/page.tsx:          "date": "A moody noir date",

app/page.tsx:          "leadStory": {
app/page.tsx:            "title": "Main Story Title",

app/page.tsx:      `;
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
app/page.tsx:        model: 'gemini-3-flash-preview',
app/page.tsx:        contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: prompt }] }],
app/page.tsx:        config: {
app/page.tsx:          tools: [{ googleSearch: {} }] as any,
app/page.tsx:          safetySettings: [
app/page.tsx:            { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_HATE_SPEECH, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
app/page.tsx:            { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_HARASSMENT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
app/page.tsx:            { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUALLY_EXPLICIT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
app/page.tsx:            { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS_CONTENT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH }
app/page.tsx:          ],
app/page.tsx:          maxOutputTokens: 8192
app/page.tsx:        }
app/page.tsx:      });
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      if (response?.candidates?.[0]?.finishReason && !['STOP', 'MAX_TOKENS'].includes(response.candidates[0].finishReason)) {
app/page.tsx:        throw new Error(`FinishReason: ${response.candidates[0].finishReason}`);
app/page.tsx:      }
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      let text = response.text || '';
app/page.tsx:      
app/page.tsx:      // Robust JSON extraction
app/page.tsx:      const jsonMatch = text.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);
app/page.tsx:      if (!jsonMatch) {
app/page.tsx:        throw new Error("Could not parse newsletter data. Please try again.");
app/page.tsx:      }
app/page.tsx:      
app/page.tsx:      const edition = JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]);
app/page.tsx:      setNewspaperEdition(edition);
app/page.tsx:      setToast({ message: "Newsletter Edition Published!", type: 'success' });
app/page.tsx:    } catch (error) {
app/page.tsx:      console.error("Newspaper Error:", error);
app/page.tsx:      handleAIError(error, "Newsletter Generation");
app/page.tsx:      // Fallback to a local-style template if AI fails
app/page.tsx:      setNewspaperEdition({
app/page.tsx:        newspaperName: `The ${newspaperLocation.city || 'Shadow'} Dispatch`,
app/page.tsx:        date: "A Cold Night in the City",

app/page.tsx:              { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUALLY_EXPLICIT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },

app/page.tsx:            ]
app/page.tsx:          }
app/page.tsx:        });
app/page.tsx:        
app/page.tsx:        if (response.candidates?.[0]?.finishReason && !['STOP', 'MAX_TOKENS'].includes(response.candidates[0].finishReason)) {
app/page.tsx:          throw new Error(`FinishReason: ${response.candidates[0].finishReason}`);
app/page.tsx:        }
app/page.tsx:        
app/page.tsx:        const imagePart = response.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.find(p => p.inlineData);
app/page.tsx:        if (imagePart?.inlineData) {
app/page.tsx:          const base64Data = `data:${imagePart.inlineData.mimeType};base64,${imagePart.inlineData.data}`;
app/page.tsx:          const compressedData = await compressImage(base64Data);
app/page.tsx:          
app/page.tsx:          const path = `users/${user.uid}/stories`;
app/page.tsx:          await addDoc(collection(db, path), {
app/page.tsx:            uid: user.uid,
app/page.tsx:            type: 'image',
app/page.tsx:            content: compressedData,
app/page.tsx:            isSaved: false,
app/page.tsx:            createdAt: Date.now()
app/page.tsx:          });
app/page.tsx:        }
app/page.tsx:        break; // Success
app/page.tsx:      } catch (error: any) {
app/page.tsx:        const errorString = String(error).toLowerCase();
app/page.tsx:        if ((errorString.includes("429") || errorString.includes("quota") || errorString.includes("rate limit")) && retries < maxRetries) {
app/page.tsx:          retries++;
app/page.tsx:          await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 2000 * retries)); // Exponential backoff
app/page.tsx:          continue;
app/page.tsx:        }
app/page.tsx:        handleAIError(error, "Image generation");
app/page.tsx:        break;
app/page.tsx:      }
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:    
app/page.tsx:    if (storyId) setIsGeneratingImage(null);
app/page.tsx:  };
app/page.tsx:

app/page.tsx:          resolution: '720p',
app/page.tsx:          aspectRatio: '16:9'

app/page.tsx:        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 10000));

app/page.tsx:

app/page.tsx:      // Use the injected API key if available, otherwise fallback to the public one
app/page.tsx:      const apiKey = (process.env as any).API_KEY || process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_GEMINI_API_KEY || '';
app/page.tsx:      const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey });
app/page.tsx:      
app/page.tsx:      let songData;
app/page.tsx:      try {
app/page.tsx:        let content = storyPart.content.trim();
app/page.tsx:        if (content.startsWith('```json')) {
app/page.tsx:          content = content.replace(/^```json/, '').replace(/```$/, '').trim();
app/page.tsx:        } else if (content.startsWith('```')) {
app/page.tsx:          content = content.replace(/^```/, '').replace(/```$/, '').trim();
app/page.tsx:        }
app/page.tsx:        songData = JSON.parse(content);
app/page.tsx:      } catch (e) {
app/page.tsx:        console.error("Failed to parse song data", e);
app/page.tsx:        setHistory(prev => prev.map(p => p.id === storyPart.id ? { ...p, isGeneratingMusic: false } : p));
app/page.tsx:        return;
app/page.tsx:      }
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      const musicPrompt = `Generate a gritty, adult (18+) music track. 
app/page.tsx:      Style: ${songData.style}. 
app/page.tsx:      Mood: Intense, raw, street-level. 
app/page.tsx:      Lyrics context: ${songData.lyrics.substring(0, 200)}`;
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      const response = await ai.models.generateContentStream({
app/page.tsx:        model: "lyria-3-clip-preview",
app/page.tsx:        contents: musicPrompt,
app/page.tsx:        config: {
app/page.tsx:          maxOutputTokens: 16384,
app/page.tsx:          responseModalities: [Modality.AUDIO],
app/page.tsx:          safetySettings: [
app/page.tsx:            { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_HATE_SPEECH, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
app/page.tsx:            { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_HARASSMENT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
app/page.tsx:            { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUALLY_EXPLICIT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
app/page.tsx:            { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS_CONTENT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH }
app/page.tsx:          ],
app/page.tsx:        }
app/page.tsx:      });
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      let audioBase64 = "";
app/page.tsx:      let mimeType = "audio/wav";
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      for await (const chunk of response) {
app/page.tsx:        const parts = chunk.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts;
app/page.tsx:        if (!parts) continue;
app/page.tsx:        for (const part of parts) {
app/page.tsx:          if (part.inlineData?.data) {
app/page.tsx:            if (!audioBase64 && part.inlineData.mimeType) {
app/page.tsx:              mimeType = part.inlineData.mimeType;
app/page.tsx:            }
app/page.tsx:            audioBase64 += part.inlineData.data;
app/page.tsx:          }
app/page.tsx:        }
app/page.tsx:      }
app/page.tsx:
app/page.tsx:      if (audioBase64) {
app/page.tsx:        const binary = atob(audioBase64);
app/page.tsx:        const bytes = new Uint8Array(binary.length);
app/page.tsx:        for (let i = 0; i < binary.length; i++) {
app/page.tsx:          bytes[i] = binary.charCodeAt(i);
app/page.tsx:        }
app/page.tsx:        // Ensure we use a standard audio MIME type
app/page.tsx:        const finalMimeType = mimeType.includes('wav') ? 'audio/wav' : (mimeType.includes('mpeg') ? 'audio/mpeg' : 'audio/wav');
app/page.tsx:        const blob = new Blob([bytes], { type: finalMimeType });
app/page.tsx:        const audioUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
app/page.tsx:        
app/page.tsx:        setHistory(prev => prev.map(p => p.id === storyPart.id ? { ...p, musicUrl: audioUrl, isGeneratingMusic: false } : p));
app/page.tsx:      }
app/page.tsx:    } catch (error) {
app/page.tsx:      handleAIError(error, "Music generation");
app/page.tsx:      setHistory(prev => prev.map(p => p.id === storyPart.id ? { ...p, isGeneratingMusic: false } : p));
app/page.tsx:    }
app/page.tsx:  };

firestore.rules:rules_version = '2';
firestore.rules:service cloud.firestore {
firestore.rules:  match /databases/{database}/documents {
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:    // Assumed Data Model
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:    // Collection: users
firestore.rules:    // Fields: uid (string), genres (list), intensity (string), elements (list), voice (string), updatedAt (number)
firestore.rules:    //
firestore.rules:    // Collection: users/{uid}/stories
firestore.rules:    // Fields: uid (string), type (string), content (string), feedback (string), createdAt (number)
firestore.rules:    //
firestore.rules:    // Collection: users/{uid}/drafts
firestore.rules:    // Fields: uid (string), text (string), createdAt (number)
firestore.rules:    //
firestore.rules:    // Collection: users/{uid}/lore
firestore.rules:    // Fields: uid (string), title (string), description (string), location (string), createdAt (number)
firestore.rules:    //
firestore.rules:    // Collection: users/{uid}/characters
firestore.rules:    // Fields: name (string), personality (string), motivations (string), flaws (string), backstory (string), role (string), archetype (string), createdAt (number)
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:    // Helper Functions
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:    function isAuthenticated() {
firestore.rules:      return request.auth != null;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isOwner(userId) {
firestore.rules:      return isAuthenticated() && request.auth.uid == userId;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidUser(data) {
firestore.rules:      // SECURITY WARNING: In production, 'isPro' should only be updatable by a server-side process (e.g., Stripe webhook)
firestore.rules:      return data.keys().hasAll(['uid', 'genres', 'intensity', 'elements', 'voice']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.uid == request.auth.uid &&
firestore.rules:             data.genres is list && data.genres.size() <= 10 &&
firestore.rules:             data.intensity in ['mild', 'moderate', 'extreme'] &&
firestore.rules:             data.elements is list && data.elements.size() <= 10 &&
firestore.rules:             data.voice in ['Fenrir', 'Puck', 'Charon', 'Kore', 'Zephyr'] &&
firestore.rules:             (!('selectedVoiceCloneId' in data) || (data.selectedVoiceCloneId == null || (data.selectedVoiceCloneId is string && data.selectedVoiceCloneId.size() <= 128))) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('bundelkhandiMode' in data) || data.bundelkhandiMode is bool) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('isPro' in data) || data.isPro is bool) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('isActivated' in data) || data.isActivated is bool) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('naughtyMode' in data) || data.naughtyMode is bool) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('photoURL' in data) || (data.photoURL is string && data.photoURL.size() <= 200000)) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('customName' in data) || (data.customName is string && data.customName.size() <= 100)) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('preferredRole' in data) || data.preferredRole in ['hero', 'villain', 'none']) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('subscriptionType' in data) || data.subscriptionType in ['monthly', 'yearly', 'lifetime', 'trial', 'none']) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('subscriptionExpiry' in data) || data.subscriptionExpiry is number) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('evolution' in data) || data.evolution is map) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('updatedAt' in data) || data.updatedAt is number);
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidStory(data) {
firestore.rules:      return data.keys().hasAll(['uid', 'type', 'content', 'createdAt']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.uid == request.auth.uid &&
firestore.rules:             data.type in ['text', 'image', 'joke', 'character', 'script', 'song', 'item-song', 'reconstruction'] &&
firestore.rules:             data.content is string && data.content.size() <= 1048576 && // Firestore limit is 1MB
firestore.rules:             data.createdAt is number &&
firestore.rules:             (!('feedback' in data) || data.feedback in ['up', 'down']) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('isSaved' in data) || data.isSaved is bool) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('isPublic' in data) || data.isPublic is bool) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('choices' in data) || (data.choices is list && data.choices.size() <= 5)) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('selectedChoice' in data) || (data.selectedChoice is string && data.selectedChoice.size() <= 500));
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidDraft(data) {
firestore.rules:      return data.keys().hasAll(['uid', 'text', 'createdAt']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.uid == request.auth.uid &&
firestore.rules:             data.text is string && data.text.size() <= 5000 &&
firestore.rules:             data.createdAt is number;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidLore(data) {
firestore.rules:      return data.keys().hasAll(['uid', 'title', 'description', 'createdAt']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.uid == request.auth.uid &&
firestore.rules:             data.title is string && data.title.size() <= 200 &&
firestore.rules:             data.description is string && data.description.size() <= 5000 &&
firestore.rules:             (!('location' in data) || (data.location is string && data.location.size() <= 200)) &&
firestore.rules:             data.createdAt is number;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidCharacter(data) {
firestore.rules:      return data.keys().hasAll(['name', 'personality', 'motivations', 'flaws', 'backstory', 'role', 'createdAt']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.name is string && data.name.size() <= 100 &&
firestore.rules:             data.personality is string && data.personality.size() <= 1000 &&
firestore.rules:             data.motivations is string && data.motivations.size() <= 1000 &&
firestore.rules:             data.flaws is string && data.flaws.size() <= 1000 &&
firestore.rules:             data.backstory is string && data.backstory.size() <= 5000 &&
firestore.rules:             data.role is string && data.role.size() <= 200 &&
firestore.rules:             (!('archetype' in data) || (data.archetype is string && data.archetype.size() <= 100)) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('gender' in data) || data.gender in ['Male', 'Female', 'Other']) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('dob' in data) || (data.dob is string && data.dob.matches("^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$"))) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('tob' in data) || (data.tob is string && data.tob.matches("^\\d{2}:\\d{2}$"))) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('pob' in data) || (data.pob is string && data.pob.size() <= 200)) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('kundli' in data) || (data.kundli is string && data.kundli.size() <= 10000)) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('isActive' in data) || data.isActive is bool) &&
firestore.rules:             data.createdAt is number;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidAccessKey(data) {
firestore.rules:      return data.keys().hasAll(['key', 'isUsed', 'createdAt']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.key is string &&
firestore.rules:             data.isUsed is bool &&
firestore.rules:             data.createdAt is number &&
firestore.rules:             (!('usedBy' in data) || data.usedBy is string) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('usedAt' in data) || data.usedAt is number);
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isValidVoiceClone(data) {
firestore.rules:      return data.keys().hasAll(['uid', 'name', 'sampleData', 'createdAt']) &&
firestore.rules:             data.uid == request.auth.uid &&
firestore.rules:             data.name is string && data.name.size() <= 200 &&
firestore.rules:             data.sampleData is string && data.sampleData.size() <= 1500000 && // Allowing ~1.5MB for Base64 audio
firestore.rules:             (!('analysis' in data) || (data.analysis is string && data.analysis.size() <= 10000)) &&
firestore.rules:             (!('isPrimary' in data) || data.isPrimary is bool) &&
firestore.rules:             data.createdAt is number;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:    // Rules
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    match /users/{uid} {
firestore.rules:      allow read: if isOwner(uid);
firestore.rules:      allow create, update: if isOwner(uid) && isValidUser(request.resource.data);
firestore.rules:      
firestore.rules:      match /stories/{storyId} {
firestore.rules:        allow read: if isOwner(uid) || resource.data.isPublic == true;
firestore.rules:        allow create: if isOwner(uid) && isValidStory(request.resource.data);
firestore.rules:        allow update: if isOwner(uid) && isValidStory(request.resource.data);
firestore.rules:        allow delete: if isOwner(uid);
firestore.rules:      }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:      match /drafts/{draftId} {
firestore.rules:        allow read: if isOwner(uid);
firestore.rules:        allow create, update: if isOwner(uid) && isValidDraft(request.resource.data);
firestore.rules:        allow delete: if isOwner(uid);
firestore.rules:      }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:      match /lore/{loreId} {
firestore.rules:        allow read: if isOwner(uid);
firestore.rules:        allow create, update: if isOwner(uid) && isValidLore(request.resource.data);
firestore.rules:        allow delete: if isOwner(uid);
firestore.rules:      }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:      match /characters/{charId} {
firestore.rules:        allow read: if isOwner(uid);
firestore.rules:        allow create, update: if isOwner(uid) && isValidCharacter(request.resource.data);
firestore.rules:        allow delete: if isOwner(uid);
firestore.rules:      }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:      match /voices/{voiceId} {
firestore.rules:        allow read: if isOwner(uid);
firestore.rules:        allow create, update: if isOwner(uid) && isValidVoiceClone(request.resource.data);
firestore.rules:        allow delete: if isOwner(uid);
firestore.rules:      }
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    match /access_keys/{keyId} {
firestore.rules:      allow get: if isAuthenticated();
firestore.rules:      allow update: if isAuthenticated() && 
firestore.rules:                    resource.data.isUsed == false && 
firestore.rules:                    request.resource.data.isUsed == true &&
firestore.rules:                    request.resource.data.usedBy == request.auth.uid &&
firestore.rules:                    isValidAccessKey(request.resource.data);
firestore.rules:      allow create, list, delete: if request.auth.token.email == "royalbullsadvisory412@gmail.com";
firestore.rules:    }

firestore.rules:    }

firebase.ts:// Error handling helper
firebase.ts:export enum OperationType {
firebase.ts:  CREATE = 'create',
firebase.ts:  UPDATE = 'update',
firebase.ts:  DELETE = 'delete',
firebase.ts:  LIST = 'list',
firebase.ts:  GET = 'get',
firebase.ts:  WRITE = 'write',
firebase.ts:}
firebase.ts:
firebase.ts:interface FirestoreErrorInfo {
firebase.ts:  error: string;
firebase.ts:  operationType: OperationType;
firebase.ts:  path: string | null;
firebase.ts:  authInfo: {
firebase.ts:    userId: string | undefined;
firebase.ts:    email: string | null | undefined;
firebase.ts:    emailVerified: boolean | undefined;
firebase.ts:    isAnonymous: boolean | undefined;
firebase.ts:    tenantId: string | null | undefined;
firebase.ts:    providerInfo: {
firebase.ts:      providerId: string;
firebase.ts:      displayName: string | null;
firebase.ts:      email: string | null;
firebase.ts:      photoUrl: string | null;
firebase.ts:    }[];
firebase.ts:  }
firebase.ts:}
firebase.ts:
firebase.ts:export function handleFirestoreError(error: unknown, operationType: OperationType, path: string | null) {
firebase.ts:  const errInfo: FirestoreErrorInfo = {
firebase.ts:    error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
firebase.ts:    authInfo: {
firebase.ts:      userId: auth.currentUser?.uid,
firebase.ts:      email: auth.currentUser?.email,
firebase.ts:      emailVerified: auth.currentUser?.emailVerified,
firebase.ts:      isAnonymous: auth.currentUser?.isAnonymous,
firebase.ts:      tenantId: auth.currentUser?.tenantId,
firebase.ts:      providerInfo: auth.currentUser?.providerData.map(provider => ({
firebase.ts:        providerId: provider.providerId,
firebase.ts:        displayName: provider.displayName,
firebase.ts:        email: provider.email,
firebase.ts:        photoUrl: provider.photoURL
firebase.ts:      })) || []
firebase.ts:    },
firebase.ts:    operationType,
firebase.ts:    path
firebase.ts:  }
firebase.ts:  console.error('Firestore Error: ', JSON.stringify(errInfo));
firebase.ts:  throw new Error(JSON.stringify(errInfo));
firebase.ts:}

firebase.ts:    if(error instanceof Error && error.message.includes('the client is offline')) {
firebase.ts:      console.error("Please check your Firebase configuration. ");
firebase.ts:    }
firebase.ts:  }

out.txt:app/page.tsx:  const calculateMatchScore = useCallback((tags: string[], userProfile: UserProfile) => {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (!tags || tags.length === 0) return 0;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    let score = 30; // Base score for being in the app
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // Role match
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (userProfile.preferredRole !== 'none') {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      const lowerRole = userProfile.preferredRole!.toLowerCase();
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      if (tags.some(t => t.toLowerCase().includes(lowerRole))) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        score += 25;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // Genre match
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (userProfile.genres && userProfile.genres.length > 0) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      const genreMatches = tags.filter(t => userProfile.genres.some(g => t.toLowerCase().includes(g.toLowerCase())));
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      score += (genreMatches.length / Math.max(tags.length, 1)) * 40;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // Intensity and Elements
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    const intensityMatch = tags.some(t => t.toLowerCase().includes(userProfile.intensity.toLowerCase()));
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (intensityMatch) score += 5;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    return Math.min(Math.round(score + (Math.random() * 8)), 99); // Max 99 for that "Netflix" feel
out.txt:app/page.tsx:  }, []);

out.txt:app/page.tsx:  const pcmToWav = (base64Pcm: string, sampleRate: number = 24000) => {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    const binaryString = window.atob(base64Pcm);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    const len = binaryString.length;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    const bytes = new Int16Array(len / 2);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    const dataView = new DataView(new Uint8Array(len).buffer);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // Convert binary string to Int16Array (Gemini returns 16-bit PCM)
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      dataView.setUint8(i, binaryString.charCodeAt(i));
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    for (let i = 0; i < bytes.length; i++) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      bytes[i] = dataView.getInt16(i * 2, true);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    const wavHeader = new ArrayBuffer(44);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    const view = new DataView(wavHeader);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // RIFF identifier
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(0, 0x52494646, false); // "RIFF"
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // file length
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(4, 36 + bytes.length * 2, true);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // RIFF type
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(8, 0x57415645, false); // "WAVE"
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // format chunk identifier
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(12, 0x666d7420, false); // "fmt "
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // format chunk length
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(16, 16, true);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // sample format (1 is PCM)
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    view.setUint16(20, 1, true);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // channel count
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    view.setUint16(22, 1, true);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // sample rate
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(24, sampleRate, true);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // byte rate (sampleRate * channelCount * bitsPerSample / 8)
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(28, sampleRate * 1 * 16 / 8, true);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // block align (channelCount * bitsPerSample / 8)
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    view.setUint16(32, 1 * 16 / 8, true);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // bits per sample
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    view.setUint16(34, 16, true);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // data chunk identifier
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(36, 0x64617461, false); // "data"
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // data chunk length
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    view.setUint32(40, bytes.length * 2, true);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    const blob = new Blob([wavHeader, bytes], { type: 'audio/wav' });
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    return URL.createObjectURL(blob);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:  };
out.txt:app/page.tsx:

out.txt:app/page.tsx:    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (!file || !user) return;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    const reader = new FileReader();
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    reader.onloadend = async () => {

out.txt:app/page.tsx:  const upgradeToPro = async (plan: 'monthly' | 'yearly' | 'lifetime' | 'trial', method: 'gpay' | 'upi', paymentData?: any) => {

out.txt:app/page.tsx:

out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // this would be triggered by a webhook after verifying the transaction.
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    let expiry = 0;

out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (plan === 'trial') expiry = now + (7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (plan === 'monthly') expiry = now + (30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (plan === 'yearly') expiry = now + (365 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (plan === 'lifetime') expiry = -1;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    const updates = { 
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      isPro: true, 
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      subscriptionType: plan, 
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      subscriptionExpiry: expiry,
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      updatedAt: now 
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    };
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    updateDoc(doc(db, `users/${user.uid}`), updates)
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      .then(() => {

out.txt:app/page.tsx:      })

out.txt:app/page.tsx:      <!DOCTYPE html>
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      <html lang="en">
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        <head>
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          <meta charset="UTF-8">

out.txt:app/page.tsx:          <style>

out.txt:app/page.tsx:            .header { border-bottom: 2px solid #000; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 10px; }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            .title { font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; text-transform: uppercase; }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            .content { white-space: pre-wrap; font-size: 16px; }

out.txt:app/page.tsx:          </div>

out.txt:app/page.tsx:          <div class="footer">Generated by Pulp Noir - The Gritty Storyteller</div>
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        </body>
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      </html>
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    `);

out.txt:app/page.tsx:    printWindow.print();
out.txt:app/page.tsx:  };
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:  const compressImage = (base64Str: string, maxWidth = 1024, maxHeight = 1024, quality = 0.7): Promise<string> => {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    return new Promise((resolve) => {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      const img = new window.Image();
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      img.src = base64Str;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      img.onload = () => {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        let width = img.width;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        let height = img.height;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        if (width > height) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          if (width > maxWidth) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            height *= maxWidth / width;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            width = maxWidth;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        } else {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          if (height > maxHeight) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            width *= maxHeight / height;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            height = maxHeight;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        canvas.width = width;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        canvas.height = height;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        ctx?.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        resolve(canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', quality));
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      };
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    });
out.txt:app/page.tsx:  };
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:  const handleAudioDownload = async (part: StoryPart) => {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    let url = part.audioUrl;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (!url) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      // If no audio exists, we need to generate it.
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      await speakContent(part.id, part.content);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      // The user can download once it's ready and they click again.
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      return; 
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (url) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      const link = document.createElement('a');
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      link.href = url;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      link.download = `pulp-noir-audio-${part.id}.wav`;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      document.body.appendChild(link);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      link.click();
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      document.body.removeChild(link);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:  };
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:  const handleDownload = async (url: string, id: string) => {

out.txt:app/page.tsx:      const link = document.createElement('a');
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      link.href = blobUrl;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      link.download = `pulp-noir-${id}.png`;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      document.body.appendChild(link);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      link.click();

out.txt:app/page.tsx:      URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    } catch (error) {

out.txt:app/page.tsx:      const link = document.createElement('a');

out.txt:app/page.tsx:  const handleFeedback = async (id: string, feedback: 'up' | 'down') => {

out.txt:app/page.tsx:      ...evolution,
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      positiveFeedback: feedback === 'up' ? evolution.positiveFeedback + 1 : evolution.positiveFeedback,
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      negativeFeedback: feedback === 'down' ? evolution.negativeFeedback + 1 : evolution.negativeFeedback
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    };
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // Dynamic Focus Evolution

out.txt:app/page.tsx:      if (ratio > 0.8) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        newEvolution.currentFocus = "Mastering Gritty Atmosphere & Emotional Resonance";
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      } else if (ratio < 0.4) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        newEvolution.currentFocus = "Refining Dialogue & Street-Level Authenticity";
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      } else {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        newEvolution.currentFocus = "Balancing Psychological Depth & Noir Realism";
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // Update local state
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    setEvolution(newEvolution);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // Update story feedback
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    const storyPath = `users/${user.uid}/stories/${id}`;

out.txt:app/page.tsx:  const speakContent = async (id: string, text: string, action: 'play' | 'pause' | 'stop' = 'play') => {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    const part = history.find(h => h.id === id);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (!part) return;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (action === 'pause') {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current?.pause();
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, isSpeaking: false, isPaused: true } : h));
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      return;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (action === 'stop') {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current?.pause();
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      if (ttsAudioRef.current) ttsAudioRef.current.currentTime = 0;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, isSpeaking: false, isPaused: false } : h));
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      return;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // Handle 'play'
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (part.isSpeaking) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      // Already playing, maybe toggle to pause?
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current?.pause();
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, isSpeaking: false, isPaused: true } : h));
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      return;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // Resume if paused and it's the same audio
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (part.isPaused && ttsAudioRef.current && currentTTSIdRef.current === id) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current.play().catch(e => console.error("TTS resume failed:", e));
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, isSpeaking: true, isPaused: false } : h));
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      return;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // Stop any existing TTS audio if it's different
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (ttsAudioRef.current && currentTTSIdRef.current !== id) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current.pause();
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current = null;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    // If we already have the audio URL, just play it
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (part.audioUrl) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      currentTTSIdRef.current = id;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current = new Audio(part.audioUrl);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current.play().catch(e => console.error("TTS playback failed:", e));
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, isSpeaking: true, isPaused: false } : h));
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      ttsAudioRef.current.onended = () => {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, isSpeaking: false, isPaused: false } : h));
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        currentTTSIdRef.current = null;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      };
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      return;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    setHistory(prev => prev.map(h => h.id === id ? { ...h, isSpeaking: true, isPaused: false } : h));
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    const maxRetries = 2;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    let attempt = 0;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    let success = false;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    while (attempt <= maxRetries && !success) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      try {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        const apiKey = (process.env as any).API_KEY || process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_GEMINI_API_KEY || '';
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey });
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        const ttsPrompt = `Narrate this entire gritty pulp story from start to finish. Do not skip any part. 
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        MANDATORY: Use intense emotion (Ehsas), a noir style, and a human-like tone. 
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        Shift your voice to capture the deep feelings, pain, and grit of the characters.
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        Capture the atmosphere of the scene - if it's dark, sound serious and heavy; if it's a joke, sound cynical and sharp. 
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        Speak like a seasoned storyteller in a smoky room in old Bombay.
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        Text: ${text}`;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        const response = await ai.models.generateContentStream({
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          model: "gemini-3.1-flash-tts-preview",
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          contents: [{ parts: [{ text: ttsPrompt }] }],
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          config: {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            maxOutputTokens: 16384,
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            responseModalities: [Modality.AUDIO],
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            safetySettings: [
out.txt:app/page.tsx:              { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_HATE_SPEECH, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
out.txt:app/page.tsx:              { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_HARASSMENT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
out.txt:app/page.tsx:              { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUALLY_EXPLICIT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
out.txt:app/page.tsx:              { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS_CONTENT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH }

out.txt:app/page.tsx:              },
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            },
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          },
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        });
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        let audioBase64 = "";
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        for await (const chunk of response) {

out.txt:app/page.tsx:          if (part?.inlineData?.data) {

out.txt:app/page.tsx:          }

out.txt:app/page.tsx:        if (audioBase64) {

out.txt:app/page.tsx:          ttsAudioRef.current.play().catch(e => console.error("TTS playback failed:", e));

out.txt:app/page.tsx:            currentTTSIdRef.current = null;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          };
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          success = true;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        } else {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          throw new Error("No audio data received");
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      } catch (error) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        attempt++;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        console.warn(`TTS attempt ${attempt} failed:`, error);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        if (attempt > maxRetries) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          // Fallback to browser TTS if all retries fail
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.speechSynthesis) {

out.txt:app/page.tsx:          }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        } else {

out.txt:app/page.tsx:        }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:  };

out.txt:app/page.tsx:  const generateFullProduction = async () => {

out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:  const reconstructCrimeScene = async (query: string) => {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (!query || !user) return;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    setLoading(true);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    setPrompt('');
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    try {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      const apiKey = (process.env as any).API_KEY || process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_GEMINI_API_KEY || '';
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey });
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      let retries = 0;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      const maxRetries = 2;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      let response;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      while (retries <= maxRetries) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        try {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          response = await ai.models.generateContent({
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            model: "gemini-3-flash-preview",
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            contents: [
out.txt:app/page.tsx:              {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:                role: 'user',
out.txt:app/page.tsx:                parts: [
out.txt:app/page.tsx:                  { 
out.txt:app/page.tsx:                    text: `Analyze this crime/news headline from a psychological and noir perspective: "${query}". 
out.txt:app/page.tsx:                    Reconstruct the scene. What was the perpetrator thinking? Why did they do it? How did it happen?
