out.txt:app/page.tsx:                    ${getNaughtyInstructions()}
out.txt:app/page.tsx:                    ${getIntensityInstructions()}
out.txt:app/page.tsx:                    ${getUserAvatarInstructions()}
out.txt:app/page.tsx:                    
out.txt:app/page.tsx:                    AI Evolution Context: Version ${evolution.version}, Total Generations: ${evolution.totalGenerations}, Positive Feedback: ${evolution.positiveFeedback}, Negative Feedback: ${evolution.negativeFeedback}. Current Focus: ${evolution.currentFocus}. Use this feedback to refine the tone and style.`
out.txt:app/page.tsx:                  }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:                ]
out.txt:app/page.tsx:              }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            ],
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            config: {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:              tools: [{ googleSearch: {} }],
out.txt:app/page.tsx:              toolConfig: { includeServerSideToolInvocations: true },
out.txt:app/page.tsx:              maxOutputTokens: 16384,
out.txt:app/page.tsx:              safetySettings: [
out.txt:app/page.tsx:                { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_HATE_SPEECH, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
out.txt:app/page.tsx:                { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_HARASSMENT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
out.txt:app/page.tsx:                { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUALLY_EXPLICIT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
out.txt:app/page.tsx:                { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS_CONTENT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:              ]
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          });
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          break; // Success
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        } catch (error: any) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          const errorString = String(error).toLowerCase();
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          if ((errorString.includes("429") || errorString.includes("quota") || errorString.includes("rate limit")) && retries < maxRetries) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            retries++;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 2000 * retries));
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            continue;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          throw error;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      if (response?.candidates?.[0]?.finishReason && !['STOP', 'MAX_TOKENS'].includes(response.candidates[0].finishReason)) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        throw new Error(`FinishReason: ${response.candidates[0].finishReason}`);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      const content = response?.text || "The reconstruction was lost in the shadows...";
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      const id = Date.now().toString();
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      const newPart: StoryPart = {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        uid: user.uid,
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        type: 'reconstruction',
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        content,
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        id,
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        isSaved: false,
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        createdAt: Date.now()
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      };
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      setHistory(prev => [newPart, ...prev]);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      const newEvolution = { ...evolution, totalGenerations: evolution.totalGenerations + 1 };
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      setEvolution(newEvolution);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      if (user) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        const userPath = `users/${user.uid}`;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        updateDoc(doc(db, userPath), { evolution: newEvolution })
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          .catch(e => handleFirestoreError(e, OperationType.UPDATE, userPath));
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        const path = `users/${user.uid}/stories/${id}`;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        setDoc(doc(db, path), newPart)
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          .catch(e => handleFirestoreError(e, OperationType.WRITE, path));
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      // Auto-generate artwork removed as per user request to handle it manually via button
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      // generateImage(`A gritty, cinematic noir crime scene reconstruction: ${query}. 1950s pulp style, dramatic shadows, visceral details.`);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    } catch (error) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      handleAIError(error, "Crime Reconstruction");
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    } finally {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      setLoading(false);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:  };
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:  const generateLore = async (context: string, location: string = 'General') => {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (!user) return;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    if (!profile.isPro) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      setToast({ message: "Lore Generation is a PRO feature. Upgrade to unlock the full world!", type: 'warning' });
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      setShowProfile(true);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      return;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    }

out.txt:app/page.tsx:      LOCATION: ${location}
out.txt:app/page.tsx:

out.txt:app/page.tsx:      1. Tone: Hard-boiled, atmospheric, cynical, and evocative.
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      2. Content: Describe a specific detail about this world—a local legend, a corrupt institution, a forgotten tragedy, or a street-level truth.
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      3. Location Specifics: If location is "${location}", weave in specific sensory details, slang, or landmarks that fit that setting. 
out.txt:app/page.tsx:         (Note: If location is "Sagar, MP", mention places like 'Sagar ki Galiyan', the stagnant dust, the smell of cheap tobacco and heavy rain).
out.txt:app/page.tsx:

out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        model: "gemini-3-flash-preview",
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        contents: lorePrompt,
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        config: {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          maxOutputTokens: 2048,
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          systemInstruction: "You are the 'Shadow Architect', a master of world-building for a gritty, mature pulp noir universe. Your lore is visceral and haunting.",
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          safetySettings: [
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_HATE_SPEECH, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_HARASSMENT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUALLY_EXPLICIT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH },
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            { category: HarmCategory.HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS_CONTENT, threshold: HarmBlockThreshold.BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          ]
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      });
out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      if (response.candidates?.[0]?.finishReason && !['STOP', 'MAX_TOKENS'].includes(response.candidates[0].finishReason)) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        throw new Error(`FinishReason: ${response.candidates[0].finishReason}`);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      }

out.txt:app/page.tsx:      const lines = text.split('\n');

out.txt:app/page.tsx:      description = description.substring(0, 4900);
out.txt:app/page.tsx:

out.txt:app/page.tsx:        description,
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        location,
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        createdAt: Date.now()
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      });
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      setToast({ message: "New Lore Fragment Forged.", type: 'success' });
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      setLoreTitle('');
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      setLoreContextInput('');
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    } catch (error) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      handleAIError(error, "Lore generation");
out.txt:app/page.tsx:    } finally {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      setIsGeneratingLoreState(false);

out.txt:app/page.tsx:
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      while (retries <= maxRetries) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        try {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          // Fallback to gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview if we hit quota limits
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          const modelToUse = retries > 0 ? "gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview" : "gemini-3-flash-preview";
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          response = await ai.models.generateContent({ 
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            model: modelToUse,
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: fullPrompt }] }],
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            config: {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:              ...config,
out.txt:app/page.tsx:              maxOutputTokens: 16384
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          });
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          break; // Success
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        } catch (error: any) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          const errorString = String(error).toLowerCase();
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          const isQuotaError = errorString.includes("429") || errorString.includes("quota") || errorString.includes("rate limit") || errorString.includes("exhausted");
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          if (isQuotaError && retries < maxRetries) {
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            retries++;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            // Exponential backoff: 3s, 6s, 12s
out.txt:app/page.tsx:            const delay = 3000 * Math.pow(2, retries - 1);

out.txt:app/page.tsx:          }

out.txt:app/page.tsx:  const generateImage = async (context: string, storyId?: string) => {

out.txt:app/page.tsx:        Cinematic lighting with deep chiaroscuro shadows, dramatic rim lighting, and a thick, moody atmosphere. 
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        The scene should feature high-contrast film noir aesthetics, with long shadows and a sense of urban grit.

out.txt:app/page.tsx:        ${profile.photoURL ? `USER PHOTO INTEGRATION: Integrate the user's photo, maintaining their facial features and appearance within this dark noir setting. The character should look exactly like the person in the provided reference photo.` : ""}

out.txt:app/page.tsx:

out.txt:app/page.tsx:            safetySettings: [

out.txt:app/page.tsx:            ]
out.txt:app/page.tsx:          }
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        });
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        if (response.candidates?.[0]?.finishReason && !['STOP', 'MAX_TOKENS'].includes(response.candidates[0].finishReason)) {

out.txt:app/page.tsx:        handleAIError(error, "Image generation");
out.txt:app/page.tsx:        break;
out.txt:app/page.tsx:      }
